latHint: Think being treated unfairly - not a mine tunnel.
pivHint: Miners descend the SHAFT - but if someone 'gives you the SHAFT,' what have they done to you?
winText: Treated unfairly. SHAFT was the pivot - mine tunnel to being given the SHAFT and CHEAT-ed.
lossText: CHEAT - to treat unfairly or deceive. SHAFT was the pivot: mine SHAFT to giving someone the SHAFT.
